[Home](./index.md) &gt; [@empathyco/x-components](./x-components.md) &gt; [DeviceDetector](./x-components.devicedetector.md)

## DeviceDetector class

This component helps detecting or setting a device, that can be used later to create different layouts optimized for different devices. This detected device is available under the [XComponentAliasAPI.device](./x-components.xcomponentaliasapi.device.md) property.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class DeviceDetector extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [breakpoints](./x-components.devicedetector.breakpoints.md) |  | Record&lt;Device, MaxWidth&gt; | Record of the device name, that can be whatever you want <code>xs</code>, <code>mobile</code>, <code>big</code>... And the max width in pixels for that device. |
|  [force?](./x-components.devicedetector.force.md) |  | Device | <i>(Optional)</i> Forces a device, ignoring the [DeviceDetector.breakpoints](./x-components.devicedetector.breakpoints.md) prop. |
|  [throttleMs](./x-components.devicedetector.throttlems.md) |  | number | Time in milliseconds to throttle the resize events used to detect the device. |
